description: Updated Roman sandals have never looked this good. These rainbow coloured sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts to skirts. UpperMulti-hued straps criss-crossing the forefoot and midfoot for styleSynthetic leather ankle strap for a snug FitSynthetic leather lining on the straps for added comfortTextured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelcatwalk branding pattern on the forefoot and flower lug for better gripSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
